BaB.MapNotesAlwaysDisplayTextLabels: Map Notes: Always Display Text Labels
BaB.MapNotesAlwaysDisplayTextLabels_Hint: Force map notes to always display text labels.
BaB.MapNotesUseImageAspectRatio: Map Notes: Use Image Aspect Ratio
BaB.MapNotesUseImageAspectRatio_Hint: Set map notes' dimensions to the same aspect ratio as their source images.
